headline: UPS Inks Deal to Cap Driver Buyouts: Will the Cost Burden Ease?
summary: UPS struck a Teamsters deal capping driver severance buyouts at 7,500 and $150K each as it cuts jobs and reshapes the network through 2026.

headline: UPS Price Target Trimmed to $105 by BofA as Teamsters Settlement Tightens the Road to Margin Recovery
summary: United Parcel Service (NYSE:UPS) stock is facing fresh pressure today after Bank of America trimmed its price target on the shares. BofA lowered its target on UPS stock to $105 from $112 while keeping a Neutral rating. headline: Mailing your tax return near the deadline comes with a risk that 'matters more now than ever'
summary: While the IRS considers your return being filed on time as long as it's postmarked by the deadline, not all mail gets a postmark the day it's sent.

raw.headline: Mailing your tax return near the deadline comes with a risk that 'matters more now than ever'

headline: UPS Teamsters Deal Clarifies Severance Limits And Seniority Through 2028
summary: UPS (NYSE:UPS) and the Teamsters union have reached a new settlement over driver severance programs. The agreement resolves a conflict around a prior driver buyout program and clarifies limits on future severance offers. The deal establishes protections for Teamsters driver seniority through 2028. The settlement affects how UPS can manage workforce reductions across its package delivery operations. UPS, listed on the NYSE under the ticker UPS, sits at the center of global parcel delivery...
